title: Volkswagen India Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Volkswagen India Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Volkswagen India Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
